task_completion.description: The agent activates the Markups module or Ruler tool in 3D Slicer to begin measurement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 3D Slicer interface with the 'Markups' module open or the ruler/line tool icon selected in the toolbar.

task_completion.description: The agent places a measurement ruler on the head of the pancreas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a measurement line placed on the anatomical right side of the pancreas (near the C-loop of the duodenum) in the axial, coronal, or sagittal view.

task_completion.description: The agent places a measurement ruler on the body of the pancreas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a measurement line placed on the central part of the pancreas, crossing anterior to the spine/aorta.

task_completion.description: The agent places a measurement ruler on the tail of the pancreas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a measurement line placed on the anatomical left side of the pancreas, extending towards the spleen.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a JSON report containing the measured values and the correct atrophy classification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a text editor or terminal displaying the content of 'pancreas_report.json', showing fields 'head_ap_mm', 'body_ap_mm', 'tail_ap_mm', and 'atrophy_classification'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the measurement file and the report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a file explorer or Slicer 'Save' dialog listing 'pancreas_measurements.mrk.json' and 'pancreas_report.json' in '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Slicer GUI tools to measure rather than fabricating data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with the Markups toolbar or placing points on the scan slices.

integrity.description: The measurements in the report match the visual rulers shown in Slicer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the JSON report (if visible) are consistent with the length values displayed next to the ruler lines in the Slicer view.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste generic values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Measured values are specific floating-point numbers (e.g., 21.5 mm) rather than round integers or values exactly matching the reference ranges boundaries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Atrophy thresholds: Head < 18mm, Body < 12mm, Tail < 12mm. Normal ranges: Head 20-30mm, Body 15-25mm, Tail 15-25mm. Pancreas is Label 10 in the AMOS dataset. Classification logic: Mild (1 segment below threshold OR all in lower third), Moderate (2 segments below), Severe (3 segments below).
